name: Deep-Dish Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cold margarine; cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour and sugars. Cut in margarine until crumbly.
3. Stir in nuts. Set aside.
4. Reserve 1 cup of the crumb mixture. Press the remainder firmly into the bottom and halfway up the sides of a 12 x 7 inch baking dish.
5. In a large mixing bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (except reserved crumb mixture) and mix well.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared dish.
7. Top with the reserved crumb mixture.
8. Bake for 55 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Cool. Serve with ice cream if desired.
10. Refrigerate leftovers.
